title: LOOP COMPLETED
subtitle: Frog Knows Best · the morning after
epigraph_upright: The cycle completed, the loop closed with everything inside it accounted for.
epigraph_reversed: Closure that won't take, the loop you can't stop checking on.
scene_description: Frog Knows Best at 7 AM. The tanks are running clean. The minnows are alive. The frog is on the log. You're the morning shift.
direction_hint: Feed everything. Lock up. Walk out without looking back through the screen.
opening_log_lines: You arrive at Frog Knows Best · the morning after.
The pressure starts low. It does not stay low.
Click [b]PHASE: ACTION[/b] anytime for the rules. Try [b]MOVE ↪[/b] to walk.
